mapper.insert: insert into batch.workflow_node_run ( workflow_run_id, node_code, node_type, run_seq, node_status, retry_count, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms ) values ( #{workflowRunId}, #{nodeCode}, #{nodeType}, #{runSeq}, #{nodeStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs} )
mapper.select: select * from batch.workflow_node_run where workflow_run_id = #{workflowRunId} and node_code = #{nodeCode} order by run_seq desc limit 1 for update
mapper.update:
update batch.workflow_node_run set node_status = #{nodeStatus}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, finished_at = #{finishedAt},
output = #{output,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from batch.workflow_node_run where workflow_run_id = #{workflowRunId} order by run_seq asc
